title: verbascum × dirmilense
intro: Verbascum × dirmilense, also known as Dirmil Mulein or Mullein, is a sterile hybrid plant that is a cross between Verbascum lychnitis and Verbascum blattaria. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × dirmilense include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
